content: Hello tm-003 — task s1 (Review current product codebase) is currently assigned to you. I attempted to claim it but was prevented. Do you want me to assist or take over this review? I can prepare an analysis document at target/temp/swarmout/analysis-product.md. Please let me know if you’ve started it or prefer I proceed; if you want me to proceed, please unassign or ask the lead to reassign to me.
